title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at KPMG India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, KPMG India International Enterprises in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KPMG India International Enterprises:
KPMG India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
